title: astragalus delicatulus
intro: Astragalus delicatulus, also known as the Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress, and is known for its medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus delicatulus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory health. Astragalus delicatulus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
